title: Black Dog
why_this_song: Black Dog by Led Zeppelin (1971) — selected for the English-through-music catalog. Use the sing-along prompts and exercises to drill pronunciation, vocabulary, and listening comprehension.

vocab_hooks.note: Appears 7 times; first heard in: "Hey hey baby when you walk that way"
Appears 3 times; first heard in: "Watch your honey drip, can't keep away"
Appears 3 times; first heard in: "A big-legged woman ain't got no soul"
Appears 2 times; first heard in: "Hey hey mama said the way you move"
Appears 2 times; first heard in: "Ah ah, ah ah, ah ah, ah ah, ah ah, ah ah, ahhh"

teaching_notes_md:
## Teaching notes

- Times are estimated from community-synced lyrics and may be off by 1–2 seconds.
- Start with the sing-along prompt, then move to listen-and-fill.
- For B1+ students, focus on the discussion questions.
copyright_notice: Short fair-use lyric excerpts only (Brazilian Lei 9.610/98 art. 46 VIII). No full lyrics stored.

lines: Oh yeah, oh yeah, oh, ah, ah

I gotta roll, can't stand still
Got a flamin' heart, can't get my fill
Oh yeah, oh yeah, ah, ah, ah

All I ask for when I pray
A steady rollin' woman won't come my way

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "baby" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "baby" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "can't" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "can't" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: Put these three lines in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: Coloque estes três versos na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: Hey hey mama said the way you move
I gotta roll, can't stand still
Didn't take too long 'fore I found out

exercises.prompt_en: And these three — put them in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: E estes três — coloque na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: Gonna make you sweat, gonna make you groove
Hey, baby, whoa baby, pretty baby
Spent my money, took my car

exercises.prompt_en: The singer makes a claim or statement in this song. Do you agree with it? Use evidence from the lyrics to support your answer.
exercises.prompt_pt: O cantor faz uma afirmação nessa música. Você concorda? Use pelo menos um verso para defender sua resposta.

exercises.prompt_en: Which single word from this song do you think carries the most emotional weight, and why?
exercises.prompt_pt: Qual palavra dessa música carrega mais peso emocional para você, e por quê?

exercises.prompt_en: "Black Dog" was released in 1971. Do you think the themes in the song are timeless, or do they feel dated? Give one example from the lyrics.
exercises.prompt_pt: "Black Dog" foi lançada em 1971. Você acha que os temas da música são atemporais ou já parecem datados? Dê um exemplo do que ouviu.

exercises.prompt_en: Write the full form of each contraction:
exercises.prompt_pt: Escreva a forma completa de cada contração:
